findings.recommended_fix: Create a sales deck to pitch VOLAURA to potential customers

findings.issue: Pricing clarity for AZ market needed
findings.recommended_fix: Research and establish clear pricing for the AZ market
Identify the first 10 target organizations for VOLAURA
Anticipate and prepare responses to potential objections from Nigar and other HR managers

findings.issue: Onboarding process may not be smooth for non-technical org admins
findings.recommended_fix: Simplify the onboarding process and provide clear instructions for non-technical org admins

first_customer_playbook: Identify target organizations, establish pricing, create sales deck, anticipate objections, and simplify onboarding
